Autoresearch V7 — Live Campaign Hub

All targets at a glance — click a panel to dive in

Structure-unique successes vs. worker GPU-hours for every target: Autoresearch V7 against the fixed Complexa baseline (earlier V5/V6.3 controllers appear in the per-target view below). A green dot marks a target the fixed baseline never solved.

Discovery curves — structure-unique strict successes vs. worker GPU-hours

Snapshot

Strict-success quality (median)

Where the successes come from — by role, not recipe

Each structure-unique success is attributed to the role that produced it. Direct discoveries are additive; rescue routes are non-additive planning credit (one structure can be reached several ways). Method names and settings are withheld.

Quality of successes — Autoresearch V7 vs. Complexa baseline

Min / median / max of the three gate axes for the selected target. Strict = all strict successes; SU = structure-unique representatives (the best-interface design per structural cluster). pLDDT higher is better; iPAE and scRMSD lower is better. A green cell marks the better median. ``—'' means the comparator produced none.

Set

Distributions — box = IQR, line = median, whiskers = min/max, shaded = density; dashed = gate

Reasoning replay — the agent's hypothesis at each step

Step through the campaign: each marker is a decision point where the agent formed one or more falsifiable hypotheses about what was limiting success and what to try next. Click a marker — or press play — to read its scientific reasoning and outcome. (Control logic and configurations are not shown.)

Detail

All targets — Autoresearch V7 vs. fixed baseline and earlier controllers

SU/GPU-h uses worker (inference) GPU-hours. "—" = no finalized endpoint for that comparator. Green targets had a zero fixed-baseline.

Success quality by target — median (V7 / baseline)

Set

Definitions & caveats

Structure-unique success (SU)

What this page shows

Results (success curves, per-target metrics, where successes come from) and the agent's recorded scientific reasoning per decision point.

What it does not show

The control method and pipeline, tool configurations, and prompts are intentionally withheld. This is a "what we are doing", not "how", snapshot.

Status

Interim, in-silico monitoring snapshots; several campaigns are still running. The strict gate is a computational proxy and does not prove binding.
